description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set within a rectangular, hedge-bordered lot featuring a large, manicured lawn. The building has a flat roof with several skylights and a rooftop pool, and its facade is characterized by large, horizontal windows and clean, geometric lines. The front approach is marked by a wide staircase flanked by tall, slender trees, leading to a covered entryway. The structure includes a garage on one side and an expansive patio or driveway area on the other, with additional landscaping elements such as hedges and trees. The exterior is finished in white and gray tones, with glass and concrete surfaces dominating the visual palette. The overall design emphasizes minimalism, openness, and integration with the surrounding green space.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, skylights, and a rooftop pool, set in a landscaped lot with hedges and a wide front staircase.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, large windows, and the hedge-bordered lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, skylights, and the garage structure.
description_view_2: Rear/front approach with the wide staircase, entryway, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the patio/driveway area and additional lawn space.
